_meta.description: Independently chosen status parameters. Proposed defaults pending confirmation by ZH before go-live (SPEC.md section 3). Every threshold is an independent construction from public data; none is inherited from any third party. Published public-research conventions (the Sahm 0.50 trigger, the PMI 50 expansion line) are cited where used.

yield_curve_10y3m.elevated_rule: Spread at or above zero within elevated_window_months after the end of a sustained inversion (a run of at least sustained_inversion_min_observations consecutive daily observations below zero).

sahm_rule.watch_rule: Sahm reading at or above watch_level.
sahm_rule.elevated_rule: Sahm reading at or above elevated_level (the published Sahm 2019 trigger).

hy_credit_spreads.watch_rule: OAS at or above watch_level, or a 63-trading-day rise of at least watch_rise_bp basis points.
hy_credit_spreads.elevated_rule: OAS at or above elevated_level, or a 63-trading-day rise of at least elevated_rise_bp basis points.
hy_credit_spreads.complacency_note_rule: OAS at or below complacency_level adds a complacency note without changing status.
hy_credit_spreads.basis_note: Absolute levels are used because the keyless FRED endpoint serves this ICE-licensed series only from mid-2023, so window percentiles would drift. The anchors approximate the published long-run median and 75th percentile of the series (visible on the FRED chart back to 1996).

pmi_manufacturing_proxy.watch_rule: PMI below watch_level (the 50 expansion line, a public survey convention).
pmi_manufacturing_proxy.elevated_rule: PMI below elevated_level and lower than its print three months earlier.

leading_indicators.elevated_rule: Six-month change at or below elevated_six_month_pct (about -4% annualised, aligned with the Conference Board's published recession-signal research).

labour_market.watch_rule: Unemployment 3-month average at least watch_rise pp above its 12-month low, or payroll 3-month average change below watch_payroll_3mo_avg_thousands, or softening internals (long-term unemployed above watch_uemp27ov_yoy_pct YoY and continued claims above watch_ccsa_26wk_pct over 26 weeks).
labour_market.elevated_rule: Unemployment rise at or above elevated_rise pp, or a negative payroll 3-month average change.

lens2_composite.description: Composite = share of in-composite gauges triggered. Alarm adopted at 62.5% (5 of 8) by ZH on 2026-07-03 from the filed calibration study (reviews/2026-07-03_lens2-alarm-calibration.md): an arming line for Lens 3 confirmation, not a standalone signal. Re-run the calibration at any gauge addition or removal.
lens2_composite.candidate_rationale: Candidates evaluated 1990-2026 point-in-time: 62.5% captured every 2000-window arm and maps to the 4-of-7 line that marked both 2021 arms once the IPO gauge is counted; 75% never fires on the modern gauge set; 87.5% fired only in melt-ups.

consumer_confidence_proxy.trigger_rule: Michigan sentiment at or above trigger_percentile of its full monthly history.

retail_euphoria_aaii.trigger_rule: Bull-bear spread at or above the 90th percentile of the full weekly history (computed from the AAII workbook at run time); eased when the spread is below eased_below_pp.

manager_bullishness_naaim.trigger_rule: NAAIM exposure at or above trigger_level (all-in positioning).

growth_expectation_pe.trigger_rule: Trailing P/E at or above trigger_percentile of monthly history since 1871 (multpl).

rule_of_20.trigger_rule: P/E plus CPI year-on-year change above fair_value_sum and at or above trigger_percentile of the monthly sum history since 1948.

value_vs_growth.trigger_rule: Growth (RPG) leading value (RPV) by trigger_pp or more over window_trading_days; eased when value leads (spread below eased_below_pp).

credit_complacency_nfci.trigger_rule: NFCI in the loosest trigger_percentile of weekly readings since 1971.

deal_ipo_froth.trigger_rule: Annualised year-to-date IPO proceeds at or above trigger_percentile of the prior years available (Renaissance Capital, from 2016). Coarse by construction — short history, seasonal annualisation.

sma_trend_sp500.benign_rule: 50-day SMA at or above the 150-day SMA.
sma_trend_sp500.watch_rule: 50-day SMA below the 150-day SMA without slope confirmation.
sma_trend_sp500.elevated_rule: 50-day SMA below the 150-day SMA and both SMAs flat or falling over slope_lookback_trading_days (change at or below flat_tolerance_pct). This is the bear trigger that confirms Lens 1 or Lens 2.
sma_trend_sp500.context_rule: The 200-day SMA is displayed for context and adds a note when the index closes below it; it does not drive the status.

shiller_cape.status_rule: Context only; never a timing trigger (SPEC.md section 4). Status is always 'context' and it does not feed the lens roll-up.
shiller_cape.note_rule: Flag when above flag_level as a long-run return caveat.
